headline: Will Acute Care Strength Help Universal Health Offset Q1 Rising Costs?
summary: UHS heads into Q1 earnings with acute care and behavioral health growth, but rising labor and supply costs could cloud the outlook.

headline: Pennsylvania Court Strikes Down Decades-Old Medicaid Abortion Funding Ban
summary: Pennsylvania court strikes down Medicaid abortion ban, ruling state constitution protects reproductive autonomy rights.
